assessment.note: [SHALLOW] 'I want clearer scope' names a need but not what scope is unclear — role, decision rights, or expected outcomes; [THREAD-DEFERRED] clearer scope thread not drilled because drill cap reached and anchor stage is still uncovered.

new_queue.label: Scope specifics
new_queue.name: When you say 'clearer scope' — what specifically is unclear today?
new_queue.description: Clarifies what kind of scope ambiguity she means so the signal becomes actionable.

new_queue.label: Stretch now
new_queue.name: Which part of your current work is actually stretching you right now?
new_queue.description: Distinguishes comfort-zone execution from genuine growth moments.

new_queue.label: What's on your mind
new_queue.name: What's been most on your mind at work lately, Maria?
new_queue.description: Safe opener that lets Maria set the frame before any growth topic is introduced.

new_queue.label: Team rituals
new_queue.name: How has your participation in team rituals felt lately?
new_queue.description: Surfaces whether her reduced engagement is about energy, fit, or unresolved context.

new_queue.label: Direction
new_queue.name: When you imagine yourself eighteen months from now, what's actually different?
new_queue.description: Probes whether they have a real picture of where they want to go.

new_queue.label: Next level concrete
new_queue.name: What would make the next level feel concrete for you?
new_queue.description: Pushes from abstract ambition into the specific shape of Principal-plus scope and expectations.

new_queue.label: Manager investment
new_queue.name: What should I change in how I'm supporting your growth?
new_queue.description: Opens the manager's side of the investment conversation before asking for the employee's trade-offs.
